evidence.title: README (segment 1)
evidence.excerpt:
Remult

Full-stack CRUD, simplified, with SSOT TypeScript entities

evidence.title: README (segment 3)
evidence.excerpt: Remult uses **TypeScript entities** as a single source of truth for: ✅ CRUD + Realtime API, ✅ frontend type-safe API client, and ✅ backend ORM.

evidence.title: README (segment 4)
evidence.excerpt: - :zap: **Zero-boilerplate CRUD + Realtime API** with paging, sorting, and filtering - :ok_hand: **Fullstack type-safety** for API queries, mutations and RPC, without code generation - :sparkles: Input validation, **defined once**, runs both on the backend and on the frontend for best UX - :lock: Fine-grained **code-based API authorization** - :relieved: Incrementally adoptable

evidence.title: README (segment 5)
evidence.excerpt: **Remult supports all major databases**, including: PostgreSQL, MySQL, SQLite, MongoDB, MSSQL and Oracle.

evidence.title: README (segment 6)
evidence.excerpt: **Remult is frontend and backend framework agnostic** and comes with adapters for Express, Fastify, Next.js, Nuxt, SvelteKit, SolidStart, Nest, Koa, Hapi and Hono.

evidence.title: README (segment 7)
evidence.excerpt: > **Want to experience Remult firsthand? [Try our interactive online tutorial](https://learn.remult.dev/).**

evidence.title: README (segment 8)
evidence.excerpt: Remult promotes a **consistent query syntax for both frontend and Backend code**:

evidence.title: v3.3.1
evidence.excerpt: ## What's Changed * Doc update by @jycouet in https://github.com/remult/remult/pull/831 * Light check if admin is here (demo app) by @jycouet in https://github.com/remult/remult/pull/834 * fix: updateMany & deleteMany 'all' for JSON & InMemory by @jycouet in https://github.com/remult/remult/pull/833 * * [#830](https://github.com/remult/remult/issues/830) - changed update many to always use select none * [#829](https://github.com/remult/remult/issues/829) - fixed issue with insert & knex & autoIncrement columns * Added support for select:'none' also to `save` * Fixed issue with where:'all' **Full Changelog**: https://github.com/remult/remult/compare/v3.3.0...v3.3.1

evidence.title: v3.3.0
evidence.excerpt: ## What's Changed - [#820](https://github.com/remult/remult/issues/820) - option to eliminate update/insert result to improve performance. ```ts repo(Task).Insert({ id: 1, name: 'test' }, { select: 'none' }) ``` - Added option for `deleteMany({where:'all'})` and `updateMany({where:'all',set:{ status:0 }})` - Fixed a bunch if issues around `ValueConverter.DateOnlyString` - Query-args-and-to-db-sql by @noam-honig in https://github.com/remult/remult/pull/801 **Full Changelog**: https://github.com/remult/remult/compare/v3.2.3...v3.3.0

evidence.title: v3.2.0
evidence.excerpt: ## What's Changed * select fields by @noam-honig in https://github.com/remult/remult/pull/786 Added support for `select` in `find`, now you can select which fields will be part of the query and part of the result. ```ts await repo(Task).find({ select: { id: true, title: true } }) ``` * update deps, fixes import_remult.Fields by @delebash in https://github.com/remult/remult/pull/783 ## New Contributors * @delebash made their first contribution in https://github.com/remult/remult/pull/783 **Full Changelog**: https://github.com/remult/remult/compare/v3.1.2...v3.2.0

evidence.title: ROOT_FILES
evidence.excerpt: .circleci, .claude, .github, .gitignore, .gutattributes, .prettierrc, .vscode, CHANGELOG.md, CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md, CONTRIBUTING.md, LICENSE, README.md, codecov.yml, docs, examples, misc, package-lock.json, package.json, projects, render.yaml, static, tsconfig.json, tsconfig.server.json, tsconfig.tests.json, vitest.config.ts
